title: Merch Evangelion Illustrations 2007 2017
wikitext:
[]: [Merch] Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Dec 22, 2017 8:51 am http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-5336.html 600 illustrations from the Khara years of Eva all in one 3,000 yen book. Seems like the Die Stern of NME. Not exactly the dedicated Takeshi Honda artbook I've always wanted but hell yes I'm buying this. Format: B4 (330mm by 257mm) 176 pages. Looks like they'll be cramming a ton of pics per page but oh well. Cover Illustration by Takeshi Honda Amazon link: https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4909466010/ EDIT: Messed around with gamma in the above pic for clarity. 2.0 plugsuits for everyone!: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Fri Dec 22, 2017 8:59 am Looks good, I’ll keep an eye out for it. Thank God there’s a bookstore not too far away from me that imports Japanese books

[]: Re: Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Feb 02, 2018 10:34 am Finished cover illustration: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 02, 2018 12:15 pm Zeruss posted a cleaned version. I'm too stupid to figure out how to embed the post, so here.

[]: Re: Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Feb 02, 2018 3:54 pm Reichu wrote: Zeruss posted a cleaned version. I'm too stupid to figure out how to embed the post, so here.

[]: Re: Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sat Feb 03, 2018 7:33 pm Sweet! I'll have to look into getting it sometime.

[]: Re: Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Mar 19, 2018 6:00 am tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) It looks very nice.

[]: Re: Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Mar 19, 2018 2:20 pm This book is most definitely going on my shopping list, thank you very much for posting it here

[]: Re: Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by Joseki » Wed Mar 21, 2018 2:57 pm Last illustration in the book. Oh khara you sweet cock-teasers Source

[]: Re: Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 21, 2018 6:31 pm Damn, that's a serious tease I might look into this book at some point (my main "Eva merch" priority is nabbing Die Sterne 2.0 when I have the time/money) .

[]: Warning regarding the new 2007-2017 artbook             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Mar 24, 2018 10:50 am I got this artbook, and it's really great, but I was surprised to see that the calendar illustrations weren't in it. Literaryeagle, who also posts on this site doing Eva book reviews, informed me those are only in the limited edition of the book. I don't know for sure where you can get that one, but I believe it's on the Eva Store, which doesn't ship outside Japan. Literaryeagle knows because he owns a copy and will do a review soon, but I still felt morally obligued to warn about this ASAP I guess. I can eventually get the limited edition, but this is still kinda disappointing since I looked forward to that art. Edit: The same goes for some of those Anno lamp illustrations.

[]: Re: Warning regarding the new 2007-2017 artbook             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Sat Mar 24, 2018 11:26 am I'm a she, not a he. Anyway, yeah, the Limited Edition of the book is an Evangelion Store exclusive, and it comes with a second book containing more art. I'll be sure to review it once I receive it... Since the Evangelion Store doesn't ship overseas, I had to order it through a shopping deputy. So I'm still waiting for the shopping deputy to receive it, then I pay them for shipping, then they'll ship it out to me... and then when it finally arrives, I'll be able to do a review. Whew! A bit complicated, I know. Such is the life of an Evangelion book nut.

[]: Re: Warning regarding the new 2007-2017 artbook             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Mar 24, 2018 12:28 pm I'm a she, not a he

[]: Re: Warning regarding the new 2007-2017 artbook             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Mar 24, 2018 12:43 pm You can order the Limited Edition via CD Japan, who will do the deputy bit for you with minimum hassle. http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/product/NEODAI-34467

[]: Re: Warning regarding the new 2007-2017 artbook             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Mar 24, 2018 1:44 pm Thanks for the link!

[]: Re: Warning regarding the new 2007-2017 artbook             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Apr 03, 2018 2:38 pm kuribo-04 wrote: Thanks for the link!

[]: Re: Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Apr 03, 2018 2:48 pm Now in the right thread: A nice video showing almost all the pages in the book

[]: Re: Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Tue Apr 03, 2018 2:57 pm Joseki wrote: Here it is

[]: Re: Warning regarding the new 2007-2017 artbook             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Apr 04, 2018 6:12 am pwhodges wrote: After I posted I got a message saying it was out of stock, and a refund. Did you have any better luck?

[]: Re: Evangelion Illustrations 2007-2017             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Apr 04, 2018 10:14 am Joseki wrote: Now in the right thread: A nice video showing almost all the pages in the book
